steps.title: Mount to Ribs
steps.content: Bolt bracket to enclosed trailer wall post stud to offset the mounting face.

es.title: Mount to Ribs
es.content: Bolt bracket to enclosed trailer wall post stud to offset the mounting face.

steps.title: Attach Rack
steps.content: Secure equipment rack onto offset studs to provide spacing from plywood wall.

es.title: Attach Rack
es.content: Secure equipment rack onto offset studs to provide spacing from plywood wall.
